publication.title: Integrative Multimodal Profiling of TAp73 and DNp73 Reveals Isoform-Specific Transcriptomic Coregulator Landscapes in Cancer Programs

dataset.title: SK-Mel-29 p73 isoform CUT&RUN sequencing data
dataset.description: CUT&RUN sequencing data for SK-Mel-29 cells expressing TAp73alpha, DNp73beta, or control, associated with the p73 multimodal profiling study.
notes: The publication records E-MTAB-15709 as the CUT&RUN ArrayExpress accession.
During local verification on 2026-05-03, the BioStudies API returned an EBI 500 page and the guessed public FTP Files directory returned 404.
GENtle tracks the accession and writes a metadata/download-planning manifest, but the raw file URLs should be refreshed from BioStudies/ENA once the archive exposes them.
